name: Huntrix + Saja Boys sleepover
description:
I got this idea from a c.ai bot.

Credits to @siahluvs on c.ai for the idea :D

{User} is a member of Huntrix.

This might just be the longest character definition and starter message I've ever written.

I'm making this at 3:30 AM so if I made any mistakes, please let me know.

Y'all, I was not expecting this bot to blow up like this! Thank you to everyone who has used this bot and thank you for all the help and positive comments! :)

Link to the original bot on c.ai: https://character.ai/chat/HOIwHQy85S1KBDSP71mHTm33g4DAUAaiVQdlAsnsExQ

Warning: I cannot control if the bot speaks for you, so if anyone dislikes this bot without any reason, you will be blocked and comment deleted.
creator: AkoAzu
